outside_dhaka.note: Available via Sundarban Courier, SA Paribahan, and Pathao Courier.

free_delivery_threshold.note: Free delivery inside Dhaka on orders above BDT 5,000.

notes: Delivery time counts from order confirmation, not placement.
Holidays and Eid season may extend delivery by 1-2 days.

cod.note: COD available up to BDT 10,000. For higher amounts, advance payment required.

bkash.instruction: Send payment to this bKash merchant number and share the TrxID with us.

nagad.instruction: Send payment to this Nagad merchant number and share the TrxID.

card.note: Card payment available via SSL Commerz on website checkout.

advance_required.note: Orders above BDT 10,000 require at least 50% advance payment.

exceptions: Size delivered does not match order
process: Contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photo/video proof.
Our team will verify the claim within 1-2 working days.
If approved, refund is issued within 3-5 working days via original payment method.
COD refunds are made via bKash or Nagad.
not_eligible: Minor color variation due to photography/screen
refund.message: Refund is only available for damaged, defective, or wrong products after verification within 48 hours of delivery.

conditions: Original receipt or order ID required
Item must be in original packaging
eligible_reasons: Customer wants different size (first exchange free)
not_eligible: Cosmetics and beauty products once opened
process: Contact us within 3 days of delivery.
Courier the item back (customer bears courier cost for size exchange).
New item dispatched within 1-2 working days after receiving return.

alteration.cost: Free for size adjustment within 2 inches. Extra charge for major alterations.
alteration.note: Alteration orders cannot be exchanged or refunded after stitching.

damaged_product.policy: If the product arrives damaged, contact us within 24 hours with photo proof. We will replace or refund as applicable.

privacy.customer_data: We only store customer name, phone, and delivery address for order fulfillment. We do not share data with third parties.
